prompt: A close-up shot of a small digital camera screen. The LCD displays a early 2010s style photo, using an uploaded image. A truly nostalgic digital camera aesthetic. Slight motion blur and digital grain enhance the candid realism. The camera UI is visible on the LCD, including a timestamp '8. 1. 2012 3:15 PM', exposure data '1/30 F3.4 ISO 100', a focus indicator, and a small green battery icon in the corner. The image retains visible screen pixel structure, subtle glare reflections, color softness, and compressed digital textures. Outside the LCD, the surrounding darkness is gradually blurred, emphasizing the glowing nostalgic screen. The shot resembles a real Sony digital point-and-shoot camera from the early 2010s using a CCD sensor with vintage digital rendering.
